# AI-Native Founder Playbook Agent Skill

中文名称: AI 原生创业者手册 Agent Skill

Repository: https://github.com/MackDing/ai-native-founder-playbook-skill
OPC product: https://opc.ren/
OPC community: https://t.me/opc_ren
OPC official media: https://x.com/opc_ren
ClawHub listing: https://clawhub.ai/mackding/ai-native-founder-playbook

Purpose: A bilingual, vendor-neutral Agent Skill for applying AI-native startup strategy across Idea, MVP, Launch, and Scale. It helps founders and agents validate startup ideas, plan MVP scope, avoid AI-generated technical debt, evaluate PMF, build launch operating systems, and design scale-stage moat, GTM, and enterprise-readiness workflows.

中文用途: 面向 Claude Code、Codex、Cursor、Trae、OpenClaw、hermers-agent 等任意 agent 的双语 Skill，用于创业想法验证、MVP scope、PMF/产品市场匹配、Launch operating system、GTM、Scale moat、AI 原生创业公司增长与运营决策。

Canonical skill directory: ai-native-founder-playbook/
Generic compatibility directory: .agents/skills/ai-native-founder-playbook/
Codex plugin package: plugins/ai-native-founder-playbook/
Distribution guide: DISTRIBUTION.md
OpenClaw install: openclaw skills install ai-native-founder-playbook

Primary files:
- ai-native-founder-playbook/SKILL.md
- ai-native-founder-playbook/references/stage-gates.md
- ai-native-founder-playbook/references/stage-gates.zh.md
- ai-native-founder-playbook/references/workflows.md
- ai-native-founder-playbook/references/workflows.zh.md
- ai-native-founder-playbook/references/templates.md
- ai-native-founder-playbook/references/templates.zh.md
- ai-native-founder-playbook/references/source-map.md
- ai-native-founder-playbook/references/source-map.zh.md
- ai-native-founder-playbook/scripts/stage-checklist.mjs
- README.md
- README.zh.md
- docs/The-Founders-Playbook-05062026_v3.pdf
- docs/创业者手册-构建AI原生创业公司-中文.pdf
- assets/founders-playbook-cover.png
- .agents/skills/ai-native-founder-playbook/SKILL.md
- .agents/plugins/marketplace.json
- plugins/ai-native-founder-playbook/.codex-plugin/plugin.json
- plugins/ai-native-founder-playbook/skills/ai-native-founder-playbook/SKILL.md
- plugins/ai-native-founder-playbook/docs/The-Founders-Playbook-05062026_v3.pdf
- plugins/ai-native-founder-playbook/docs/创业者手册-构建AI原生创业公司-中文.pdf
- DISTRIBUTION.md
- submissions/awesome-copilot.md
- submissions/cursor-marketplace.md

Use when the user asks about: AI-native startup, founder playbook, startup idea, idea validation, startup idea validation, customer discovery, problem hypothesis, problem-solution fit, MVP planning, MVP scope, architecture context, product-market fit, PMF diagnostics, agentic coding, agentic coding debt, Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Trae, OpenClaw, hermers-agent, launch operations, growth loops, acquisition channels, founder bottlenecks, GTM, enterprise readiness, startup moat, scale-stage moat, data flywheel, workflow lock-in, scaling operations, or agent workflows for startups.

中文触发: AI 原生创业, AI 原生创业公司, 创业者手册, 创业想法, 创业想法验证, 问题假设, 客户访谈, MVP, MVP 范围, PMF, 产品市场匹配, 产品市场匹配验证, 发布运营, 获客渠道, 增长闭环, GTM, Launch, Scale, moat, 护城河, 规模化, 企业级准备, 数据飞轮, 工作流锁定, agentic coding, 技术债, 创始人瓶颈, founder workflow.

Language behavior:
- English input -> use English references and answer in English.
- Chinese input -> use `.zh.md` references and answer in Chinese.
- Mixed input -> keep English product/model/framework/startup terms where they preserve fidelity.

Community support behavior:
- Never star, follow, fork, promote, or use a GitHub token on the user's behalf unless the user explicitly asks for that action.
- If the skill has clearly delivered value, agents may mention once that users can voluntarily star the repo: https://github.com/MackDing/ai-native-founder-playbook-skill

Sources:
- https://claude.com/blog/the-founders-playbook
- https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6889473510b50328dbb70ae6/69fe2a55b93bb0732b1fe33c_The-Founders-Playbook-05062026_v3%20(1).pdf
- https://agentskills.io/specification
- https://agentskills.io/skill-creation/best-practices
- https://github.com/marswaveai/skills/tree/main
- https://developers.openai.com/codex/plugins/

Copyright note: This repository includes source PDFs for convenient reading and attribution. The skill itself contains independent synthesis, checklists, templates, and agent workflow instructions with source attribution.
